rationale: Introduce a procedural policy to minimize Windows CLI argument-length risks by preferring short command lines and response/temp files; single new file to avoid touching existing code.

edits.content: {"schema":"brainflow.policy.cli_arglen.v1","windows":{"max_inline_chars":4096,"prefer_response_files":true,"response_file_hint":"@<path>","prefer_temp_payload_file":true,"temp_dir":"${WORKSPACE}\\tmp","notes":"When building CLI commands, write large payloads to temp files and pass file paths instead of inlining JSON."}}

risks: Policy file may be unused if not wired into runtime; no behavioral change until referenced.
expected_benefit: Provides a clear, short configuration for future wiring to reduce CLI argument-length failures on Windows.
